name: Chili Cheese Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together except the cheese slices and chiles.
2. Shape the mixture into 12 thin patties, each about 3 1/2-inches in diameter.
3. Place 1 cheese slice and 1 tsp of the chiles on each of 6 patties.
4. Top with the remaining 6 patties, sealing the edges firmly.
5. Broil or grill the patties 4-inches from the heat, turning once, until the desired doneness is reached, about 10 to 15 minutes.
